message:
Align design system CSS with brand plugin

Update design-system-core.css to match the authoritative brand plugin
specifications, including corrected color values, two-layer shadows,
complete spacing scale, and all -100 color variants. Refactor the
node sizing calculator to use global --tnz-* tokens instead of
defining local duplicates.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
